title: cosmer wax and Wayne
description: Most of the tech and magic in Alloy of Law
body: Step into a world inspired by _The Alloy of Law_, where technology and magic intertwine. This modpack brings together industrial innovation and mystical power through metallurgy, alchemy, and advanced machinery. Smelt rare alloys, craft intricate devices, and master metal-based abilities as you explore a world where science and sorcery coexist in perfect balance.
